scripts.generate:events: python3 scripts/audit_polity_names_v03.py && python3 scripts/add_republican_period_v03.py && python3 scripts/validate_v03.py && python3 scripts/build_historical_events_v03.py && python3 scripts/validate_strategic_locations_v03.py
scripts.generate:data: python3 scripts/audit_polity_names_v03.py && python3 scripts/add_republican_period_v03.py && python3 scripts/validate_v03.py && python3 scripts/build_historical_events_v03.py && python3 scripts/validate_strategic_locations_v03.py && python3 scripts/prepare_admin_boundaries.py && python3 scripts/prepare_neighbor_boundaries.py && python3 scripts/generate_public_data.py
scripts.generate:data:india: python3 scripts/generate_world_history_yearly.py --dataset vIndian && python3 scripts/validate_world_history_dataset.py --dataset vIndian && python3 scripts/prepare_indian_admin_boundaries.py && python3 scripts/prepare_indian_neighbor_boundaries.py && python3 scripts/validate_territory_overrides_vindian.py && python3 scripts/build_vindian_public_data.py
scripts.generate:data:europe: python3 scripts/generate_world_history_yearly.py --dataset vEuropean && python3 scripts/validate_world_history_dataset.py --dataset vEuropean && python3 scripts/prepare_european_admin_boundaries.py && python3 scripts/prepare_european_neighbor_boundaries.py && python3 scripts/validate_territory_overrides_european.py && python3 scripts/build_european_public_data.py
scripts.generate:data:all: npm run generate:data && npm run generate:data:india && npm run generate:data:europe
